channel.title: Health-Fitness on Blake Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Health-Fitness on Blake Blog

item.title: Hips — Bullet Proofing
item.description:
**Need to do the PT tests each week and monitor changes (then monthly and so on) Fix pain as it arises and work on stability when not in pain (progressive overload very very slowly and safely - volume of exercises not so much weight) [[#^90ca6f|Hip Tests]] [[#Journal|Journal]]

⭐️Swimming + standing desk ⭐️Maybe the spruhts Laying hip pull down thing then glute bridge Hip airplanes

Issues Pirifornis, hip flexors + weak glute leading to anterior tilt and performs pushing on sciatic nerve causing pain Something in shoulder pushing on nerve causing impingement - then on that gets relieved from the neck stretch

item.title: Knees — Bullet Proofing
item.description: Notes on knee strength, mobility, and precautions.
